description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release CD that runs on manual dispatch and when a release is published. The workflow has two jobs: nuget and release-asset. The nuget job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up NuGet with a secret API key, creates a NuGet package from a nuspec file in the ./nuget directory, and publishes it to NuGet. The release-asset job, which does not run on manual dispatch, creates a tarball and a zip archive of the repository, excluding the .git directory, and uploads them as release assets.
